sentences: We discussed the term q-tips in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 q-tips 這個詞。
The article mentioned q-tips in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 q-tips。
Did you hear that duck make a quack? 你聽到那隻鴨子嘎嘎叫了嗎？
The term quack refers to the sound made by a duck. 嘎嘎聲一詞指的是鴨子發出的聲音。

meaning: 一份四杯濃縮咖啡；含四杯濃縮咖啡。
sentences: The term quad refers to a serving of four shots of espresso; containing four shots of espresso. 四杯一詞指的是四杯濃縮咖啡；包含四杯濃縮咖啡。
The lesson introduced quad as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「四邊形」這個易於理解的有用術語。
We practiced using quadrangle in two different sentences. 我們練習把 quadrangle 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The article mentioned quadrangle in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 quadrangle。
The documentary introduced the habits of the quadrant. 那部紀錄片介紹了quadrant的習性。
My nephew can already identify a quadrant in pictures. 我姪子已經可以在圖片中辨認出quadrant。
The app has a quadrilateral interface for new users. 這個 App 的介面對新手來說很quadrilateral。
We need a more quadrilateral plan before launch day. 在上線前，我們需要一個更quadrilateral的計畫。

meaning: 某物的長度、大小或數量是原來的四倍。
sentences: He's quite an athlete and can do quadruple jumps with ease. 他是一名出色的運動員，可以輕鬆地完成四周跳。
Something described as quadruple is being four times as long, as big or as many of something. 所謂四倍的東西是指某物的長度、大小或數量的四倍。

meaning: 過度歧視或不必要的細緻；挑剔;古板的。
sentences: Something described as quaint is overly discriminating or needlessly meticulous; fastidious; prim. 被描述為古怪的事物是指過於挑剔或不必要的細緻；挑剔;一本正經的。
The word quaint is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 古雅這個字常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The buildings began to quake during the sudden and powerful earthquake. 在突如其來且強大的地震中，建築物開始震動。
She was quaking with fear after hearing the mysterious noise in the woods. 聽見森林裡傳來的神秘噪音後，她嚇得全身發抖（震動）。

meaning: 貴格會的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term quaker refers to alternative letter-case form of Quaker. 術語「貴格會」是指貴格會的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced quaker as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了貴格會作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
You must have the relevant academic qualifications to apply for the position. 您必須具備相關學術資格才能申請該職位。
He was promoted to senior manager after achieving his professional qualifications. 在取得專業證書（資格）後，他被晉升為高級經理。

meaning: 四 具备……的学历 (或資歷) 的
sentences: Kevin qualifieded the report carefully yesterday. Kevin昨天仔細地qualified了報告。
Our team qualifieds this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會qualified這個步驟。
The qualifier explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位qualifier清楚地向大家說明了問題。
Our team invited a skilled qualifier to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的qualifier帶領工作坊。
You must have a degree in education to qualify for the teaching position. 您必須擁有教育學位才有資格（取得資格）擔任教職。
The team managed to qualify for the final after winning several matches. 該隊在贏得幾場比賽後成功晉級（符合資格）決賽。

meaning: 基於某種質量而不是某種數量的描述或區別。
sentences: Something described as qualitative is of descriptions or distinctions based on some quality rather than on some quantity. 被描述為定性的事物是基於某種質量而不是某種數量的描述或區別。
The word qualitative is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 定性一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
The company is committed to providing high-quality products. 公司致力於提供高品質的產品。
Success in this field depends on the quality of your work. 在這個領域的成功取決於你工作的品質。

meaning: 確定（變數或表達式）的值。
sentences: To quantify means to determine the value of (a variable or expression). 量化意味著確定（變數或表達式）的值。
People may quantify in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同情況下進行量化。

meaning: 測量和數據類型：基於某些數量或數字而不是某些質量。
sentences: quantitative data 量化數據
Something described as quantitative is of a measurements and data types: based on some quantity or number rather than on some quality. 定量描述的東西是測量和數據類型：基於某些數量或數字而不是某些品質。
The store offers a discount if you buy a large quantity of items. 如果妳購買大量商品，這家店會提供折扣。
We should focus on the quality of our study rather than quantity. 我們應該專注於學習的品質而不是數量。

meaning: 訴訟中勝訴方所獲得的賠償金額。
sentences: The term quantum refers to the amount of compensation awarded to a successful party in a lawsuit. 術語「金額」是指訴訟中勝訴方所獲得的賠償金額。
The lesson introduced quantum as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了量子這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 進入或留在隔離區，特別是自我隔離以避免流行病。
sentences: International travelers must quarantine themselves at their own expense in a designated hotel for 14 days upon arrival. 國際旅客抵達後須自費在指定飯店隔離14天。
To quarantine means to enter or stay in quarantine, particularly to self-quarantine to avoid an epidemic disease. 隔離意味著進入或處於隔離狀態，特別是為了避免流行病而進行的自我隔離。

meaning: 唯一標識文字字串的整數。
sentences: The term quark refers to an integer that uniquely identifies a text string. 術語夸克是指唯一標識文字字串的整數。
The lesson introduced quark as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了夸克這個易於理解的有用術語。
The two neighbors had a bitter quarrel over the fence between their houses. 這兩個鄰居因為房子之間的籬笆發生了激烈的爭吵。
They had a small quarrel this morning, but they have already made up. 他們今天早上發生了一點小口角，但現在已經和好了。
If you quarreled every day, your skills improve quickly. 如果你每天都quarreled，能力會進步得很快。
We had to quarreled quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速quarreled。
The engineer decided to quarreling after reading the new policy. 工程師讀完新政策後決定要quarreling。
We had to quarreling quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速quarreling。

meaning: 開採石材（例如石灰石或板岩）的地點。
sentences: Michelangelo personally quarried marble from the world-famous quarry at Carrara. 米開朗基羅親自從世界著名的卡拉拉採石場開採大理石。
The term quarry refers to a site for mining stone, such as limestone, or slate. 採石場一詞是指開採石灰石或板岩等石材的場所。
I'll meet you at the station at a quarter past ten. 我十點一刻在車站等妳。
The company reported a significant profit in the first quarter. 公司報告第一季利潤顯著增加。

meaning: 領導一個團隊或團體；主要負責某些團體項目或活動。
sentences: To quarterback means to lead a team or group; to be primarily responsible for some group project or activity. 四分衛意味著領導一個團隊或團體；主要負責某些團體項目或活動。
People may quarterback in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下擔任四分衛。

meaning: 每季（三個月）發生一次；每季舉行一次。
sentences: quarterly rent payments 按季度支付租金
Something described as quarterly is occurring once every quarter year (three months); taking place quarter-yearly. 所謂季度性的事情是指每季（三個月）發生一次；每季舉行一次。
Many visitors take photos around the quarters. 許多遊客會在quarters周邊拍照。
We met at the quarters before the event started. 活動開始前，我們先在quarters碰面。

meaning: 由四個人或事物組成的團體，特別是由四個一起演奏古典音樂的音樂家組成的團體。
sentences: The string quartet played some chamber music. 弦樂四重奏演奏了一些室內樂。
He composed a string quartet. 他創作了弦樂四重奏。

meaning: 冰毒：鹽酸甲基安非他命。
sentences: The term quartz refers to crystal meth: methamphetamine hydrochloride. 術語石英是指晶體甲基安非他命鹽酸鹽。
The lesson introduced quartz as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了石英這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 與指定的事物相似或相似。
sentences: Something described as quasi is resembling or having a likeness to the named thing. 被描述為準的東西與指定的東西相似或相似。
The word quasi is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 準這個字常被用來描述一個人、事物或情況。
the quaternary stress in a pronounced word 發音單字中的第四重音
The report describes the result as quaternary. 該報告將結果描述為四元。
We discussed the term quay in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 quay 這個詞。
We practiced using quay in two different sentences. 我們練習把 quay 放進兩個不同句子裡。
Queen Elizabeth II was the longest-reigning monarch in British history. 伊麗莎白二世是英國歷史上在位時間最長的君主。
The queen bee is the mother of all the bees in the hive. 蜂后是蜂巢中所有蜜蜂的母親。
The movie tells a beautiful and touching story about queer identity. 這部電影講述了一個關於酷兒身分認同的美麗感人故事。
The organization aims to promote equality and rights for the queer community. 該組織旨在推廣酷兒群體的平等與權利。
to quell the tumult of the soul 平息靈魂的騷動
People often quell when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會平靜下來。

meaning: 滿足，尤其是字面或像徵性的渴求。
sentences: The library quenched her thirst for knowledge. 圖書館滿足了她對知識的渴望。
People often quench when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會消退。

meaning: 一個問題，一個詢問，一個詢問。
sentences: The teacher answered the student’s query concerning biosynthesis. 老師解答了學生關於生物合成的疑問。
The term query refers to a question, an inquiry, an enquiry. 術語「查詢」指的是問題、詢問、詢問。
The scientists set out on a quest to find a cure for the rare disease. 科學家們開始了尋找（探索）這種罕見疾病治療方法的征程。
His lifelong quest for truth and justice inspired many young people. 他一生對真理和正義的追求激勵了許多青年。
If you have any questions, please feel free to ask me. 如果你有任何問題，請隨時問我。
The question of how to reduce pollution is very complex. 如何減少污染的問題非常複雜。
We used "question mark" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「question mark」。
"question mark" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「question mark」非常好用。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "question paper" for next week. 老師要我們把「question paper」背起來，下週要用。
We used "question paper" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「question paper」。
The manager gave a questionable answer during the meeting. 經理在會議中給出了一個很questionable的回答。
That is a questionable way to handle the plan. 那是處理計畫時很questionable的方法。
We reviewed the list questionably to avoid mistakes. 我們很questionably地檢查清單，以避免出錯。
Please read the instructions questionably before you start. 開始前請先questionably地閱讀說明。
The coach questioninged the details carefully yesterday. 教練昨天仔細地questioning了細節。
We had to questioning quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速questioning。
All participants in the study were asked to complete a detailed questionnaire. 所有的研究參與者都被要求完成一份詳細的問卷。
The company sent out a customer satisfaction questionnaire to its clients. 公司向客戶發出了一份顧客滿意度調查表（問卷）。
We practiced using questions in two different sentences. 我們練習把 questions 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term questions in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 questions 這個詞。

meaning: 等候名單或其他將人或物組織成先到先服務順序的方式。
sentences: The term queue refers to a waiting list or other means of organizing people or objects into a first-come-first-served order. 術語「隊列」是指等候名單或將人或物體組織成先到先服務的順序的其他方式。
The lesson introduced queue as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了隊列作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
I need to have a quick shower before we go out. 出門前我需要快速洗個澡。
She is a quick learner and picked up the new skill easily. 她學得很快，輕鬆掌握了新技能。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "quick fix" for next week. 老師要我們把「quick fix」背起來，下週要用。
You can use "quick fix" in emails and daily conversations. 你可以在 email 和日常對話中使用「quick fix」。
Please quick-witted the plan before noon. 請在中午前quick-witted計畫。
The coach quick-witteded the plan carefully yesterday. 教練昨天仔細地quick-witted了計畫。
The nurse checked the patient quickly before bedtime. 護理師在睡前很quickly地檢查病人。
The team moved quickly when the deadline became urgent. 當期限變緊迫時，團隊quickly地行動。

meaning: 運動或活動的速度；敏捷性或靈巧性
sentences: The quickness of the hand deceives the eye. 手的速度欺騙了眼睛。
The term quickness refers to rapidity of movement or activity; agility or dexterity. 術語「快速」是指運動或活動的速度；敏捷性或靈巧性。
Seven quid for a toastie? Are you taking the mick?! 一塊吐司要七英鎊？你在拿米克嗎？
The term quid refers to pound sterling. 術語“英鎊”指的是英鎊。
During the meeting, the quiescent answered every question patiently. 會議中，這位quiescent耐心回答了每個問題。
Our team invited a skilled quiescent to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的quiescent帶領工作坊。
Please be quiet in the library so others can study in peace. 在圖書館請保持安靜，以便他人能安靜學習。
The countryside is very quiet and peaceful at night. 鄉間的夜晚非常安靜祥和。
The nurse checked the patient quietly before bedtime. 護理師在睡前很quietly地檢查病人。
We reviewed the schedule quietly to avoid mistakes. 我們很quietly地檢查時程，以避免出錯。

meaning: 羽毛的下軸，特別是沒有倒刺的區域。
sentences: The term quill refers to the lower shaft of a feather, specifically the region lacking barbs. 術語“羽毛筆”是指羽毛的下軸，特別是沒有倒刺的區域。
The lesson introduced quill as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了羽毛筆這個易於理解的有用術語。
My grandmother spent months sewing this beautiful handmade quilt for me. 我祖母花了幾個月的時間為我縫製了這床漂亮的手工被（拼布被）。
It was so cold last night that I had to put an extra quilt on the bed. 昨晚太冷了，我不得不給床上加了一床厚被子。

meaning: 具有在某種程度上近似於上述特徵的特徵。
sentences: a brand of quilted toilet paper 一個品牌的絎縫衛生紙
The report describes the result as quilted. 該報告將結果描述為絎縫的。

meaning: 以 wry wry <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/wikije" 移動混蛋。
sentences: He quirked an eyebrow. 他 皺起了眉頭 。 他挑起一邊眉毛。 他眉頭皺起。
The corners of her mouth quirked. 她的嘴角 翹起 。 她的嘴角翹起。 她的嘴角翹起。

meaning: 有怪癖或特質；以一種有點愚蠢、尷尬的方式奇怪，可能很可愛。
sentences: She has a quirky laugh. 她的笑聲很古怪。
Something described as quirky is given to quirks or idiosyncrasies; strange in a somewhat silly, awkward manner, potentially cute. 古怪的東西是指怪癖或特質。以一種有點愚蠢、尷尬的方式奇怪，但可能很可愛。
He decided to quit his job and start his own business in Taipei. 他決定辭職並在台北創立自己的事業。
It's never too late to quit smoking and improve your overall health. 戒菸並改善整體健康永遠不會太晚。
The results of the study were quite surprising and unexpected. 研究結果相當令人驚訝且出乎意料。
I'm quite sure that I left my keys on the kitchen table. 我很確定我把鑰匙留在餐桌上了。

meaning: 在同等貨幣條件下；既不欠債，也不被欠債。
sentences: Here's the last of the money you lent me. We're quits now, right? 這是你借給我的最後一筆錢。我們現在就退出吧？
The report describes the result as quits. 報告將結果描述為「退出」。
Her voice began to quiver with emotion as she told the touching story. 當她講述那個感人的故事時，她的聲音因激動而開始顫抖。
The leaves of the trees quivered in the gentle morning breeze. 樹葉在清晨的微風中微微顫動（抖動）。
The teacher gave a surprise pop quiz on history this morning. 老師今天早上進行了一場歷史科的突擊小測驗。
You can take an online quiz to test your English vocabulary skills. 你可以參加線上測驗來測試你的英文詞彙能力。
The government has set a quota on the number of immigrants allowed each year. 政府對每年的移民人數設定了配額（限額）。
Each sales representative is expected to meet their monthly sales quota. 每位銷售代表都預計要達成其每月的銷售額指標（配額）。

meaning: 面 可引用的,有引用價值的
sentences: The app has a quotable interface for new users. 這個 App 的介面對新手來說很quotable。
The engineer gave a quotable answer during the meeting. 工程師在會議中給出了一個很quotable的回答。
The teacher asked us to include at least one quotation from the book in our essay. 老師要求我們在文章中至少包含一段書中的引文（引述）。
We requested a quotation from the construction company for the house renovation. 我們向建築公司索取了房屋裝修的報價單（報價）。
The author's famous quote managed to inspire millions of people. 這位作者的名言（引用語）激勵了數百萬人。
Could you please provide a quote for the car repair service? 能請您提供一份汽車維修服務的報價嗎？
The quotient explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位quotient清楚地向大家說明了問題。
Our team invited a skilled quotient to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的quotient帶領工作坊。
